name: inkling
description: Turns the **Prompt & Model Engineering Spec PDF** into something that runs itself. No more copy-pasting each prompt into the right model by hand.

scripts.build:production: npm run build && npm run build:client
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run build:client && node --test dist/tests/*.test.js
scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run audit:strict && npm run verify:runtime && npm run verify:client-bundle && npm run verify:ui
scripts.verify:runtime: npm run build && npm run build:client && node dist/scripts/verify-runtime-replay.js
scripts.verify:ui: npm run build && node dist/scripts/verify-css-architecture.js && npm run build:client && node dist/scripts/verify-client-ui.js
